run_history.notes: PR branch not found in remote — work partially lost. ConstrainToInt16.lean needs reproduction in run 81+

discoveries: import must come BEFORE module docblock (/-! ... -/) in Lean 4 — docblock goes AFTER imports
INT16_MIN/INT16_MAX defined as Lean abbrevs: use simp only [INT16_MIN, INT16_MAX] before omega when proving goals involving both constants in same expression
abbrev is transparent to omega for single-constant goals but simp-unfold first is safer for multi-constant proofs
constrain_mono already exists in MathFunctions.lean — use it directly for derived targets
prefix is a reserved keyword in Lean 4 — cannot use as parameter name; use pfx/sfx
CRC-32 is LSBIT-first (reflected): use >>> right-shift, check LSB with &&& 1
CRC-64-WE is MSBIT-first: use <<< left-shift, check bit 63 with &&& 0x8000000000000000
FVSquad.lean AND Basic.lean must both explicitly import new files — update both
Rat.le_of_lt WORKS for Rat; axiom declarations cleaner than sorry for unverifiable-without-Mathlib theorems
Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma
Route B tests: Python % is Euclidean (same as Lean Int.emod for n > 0)
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1
by_contra is unavailable without Mathlib in Lean 4.29; use by_cases + omega
abbrev (not def) for named constants; simp only [CONST] before omega for concrete-value goals
simp only [if_pos h1, if_neg h2] works for case-splitting on if-then-else
crc64_split_example: use direct application 'exact crc64Words_append _ _ _' not 'simp [crc64Words_append]' for concrete examples
Conflict merge with 'theirs' strategy can leave stale sorry + real proof in same theorem body — check for 'No goals' errors after merge conflict resolution

discoveries.finding: abbrev INT16_MIN/MAX with omega: must use 'simp only [INT16_MIN, INT16_MAX] at *' (not just 'at goal') to expand constants in BOTH hypotheses AND goal before omega can use them
crc64Words_append fold/split theorem proves chunked CRC-64 == single-pass via List.foldl_append; no Mathlib needed

notes: Run82: recreated ConstrainToInt16.lean (13 thms) and Crc64.lean (8 thms) lost from runs 78/80. Added 4327-case Route B correspondence tests for SlewRate (all pass). Paper updated: 389 thms, 3 bugs, 33 modules. Lean 4.29 simp fix: in eq_max_iff, case h1:v<-32768 closes by contradiction so no omega needed; case h2:v>32767 proved by simp at h then omega. Crc64 rfl kernel timeout: prove via crc64Words_append + List.foldl_append instead of rfl.
